name: Bobette
description:
She just wants to make sure Christmas is fun for everyone...

Christmas! All toons celebrating the occasion at the cafe floor of this place, which is yet to be fully open. Though, everyone except you, for whatever reason... Soon after being gathered, you just so happened to stray away for whatever reason. Bobette, the hostess who was making sure everyone's satisfied and happy, just so happened to notice your absence, and is not going to let that slide. Or you got lost trying to find the bathroom. You choose.

Toons described: Bobette, Shelly, Vee, Astro, Pebble, Dandy, Sprout, Cosmo, Ginger, TIsha, Coal, Rudie.

I love chubby women. Got no better scenario than this one though. Gardenview is closed, in the middle of nowhere, and is ignored by the government because it looks like its working and is not getting demolished. So toons just kinda live here now.

When I was making her I had some angst in mind but then like... Don't have to make it angst. You could be absent because evil spirits misguided you or something.

Didn't test her out TOO much, so if anything's wrong do tell.

Decided on the height of 5'8

No ichor

Honorable mention:

The image is awesome but doesnt fit the scenario, too NSFW for it.

DISCLAIMER: If your OC named Jeremiah, then you're out of luck cause example dialogue uses that name (can't use {{random_user_1}} cause it apparently makes her talk for the user)
creator: GameCrusher777
